subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath been named Kázim, who turned towards the horizon of faith and believed in the All-Merciful when others turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمی بکاظم الذی اقبل الی افق الایمان و آمن بالرحمن اذ اعرض
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
